sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13006" key="a)pola/gacis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-λάγαξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13006.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">setting at liberty,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5010</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
